overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins featuring a Medjay character exploring a desert sand dune overlooking an oasis. The character walks along an ancient stone tower, reveals a panoramic view of palm trees and water below, and interacts with an eagle companion before observing the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert dune with ancient stone tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the sand dune alongside the stone tower, moving toward the crest

entered.detail: ancient stone block tower with wooden beam protruding from top
rolling sand dunes with wind-formed ripples
rocky mountain cliffs in the distance
scattered palm trees visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the base of an ancient stone tower across wind-rippled sand dunes. Sparse palm trees and distant mountains are visible on the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: cresting the dune reveals panoramic view of oasis with palm grove, water body, and distant ruins

agents.ego_description: reaches the dune crest, slows to survey the expansive oasis landscape below, then begins turning

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees in the valley below
body of water reflecting light within the oasis
stone ruins and structures scattered throughout the oasis

segments.scene_description: Cresting the dune reveals a breathtaking view of an oasis nestled in the valley, with dense palm groves, a shimmering water body, and ancient ruins. The stone tower falls behind as the character turns to take in the panoramic landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruins and tower at dune crest

events.description: character summons eagle companion which lands on outstretched arm
eagle takes flight from character's arm and flies away

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the tower, extending arm to summon the eagle, then holding the bird while looking out over the landscape

notable_agents.action: eagle landing on character's outstretched arm and perching there

entered.detail: ancient stone tower reappearing as character returns
standing stone columns of ruined structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks back toward the stone tower, passing ancient ruined columns. An eagle swoops down to land on the character's outstretched arm, perching there for a moment before taking flight again.

agents.ego_description: standing still and gazing out over the oasis landscape, occasionally shifting view slightly

segments.scene_description: After releasing the eagle, the character stands still on the dune, quietly observing the expansive oasis below with its palm groves, distant ruins, and mountainous backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across wind-rippled sand dunes that gradually reveals a lush, hidden oasis. It begins with the character walking along the base of an ancient stone tower under a partly cloudy sky, with sparse palm trees and distant mountains on the horizon. As the character crests the dune, the view opens into a breathtaking panoramic landscape of dense palm groves, shimmering water, and ancient ruins nestled in the valley. The scene then shifts as the character turns back toward the stone tower and ruined columns, where an eagle swoops down to perch on an outstretched arm before taking flight once more. Finally, the camera settles as the character stands still on the ridge, quietly observing the expansive oasis and its mountainous backdrop.
